series_metadata.series_title: Interest Penalty for Underpayment of Estimated Tax
series_metadata.series_description: This form is used for calculating the interest of penalty for the underpayment of estimated taxes.

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: 4 years from due date then destroy. If scanned, retain for 6 months. ; Electronic: 4 years from due date then delete., Paper: Shred ; Electronic: Delete
